package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_and_handler_translate_same_error_domain: Double translation layers where middleware and handlers both map the same error family to responses.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule085NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule085NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule085NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario085Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule085NegativeService, input Rule085NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
